tools.name: OCR
tools.description: This tool can recognize all text on the input image.

outputs.description: OCR results, include bbox in x1, y1, x2, y2 format and the recognized text.

outputs.name: ImageDescription
outputs.description: A useful tool that returns a brief description of the input image.

outputs.name: RegionAttributeDescription
outputs.description: Describe the attribute of a region of the input image.

inputs.name: bbox
inputs.description: The bbox coordinate in the format of `(x1, y1, x2, y2)`

dialogs.content: What is the main focus of the image?

dialogs.thought: Check for any labels/markers on the gross pathology photo to orient anatomy.
Obtain a global description of the specimen and context (gross pathology vs imaging; key structures).

content.content: Black-and-white gross pathology photograph of a resected tissue specimen with a tubular vascular structure and adjacent bowel segment. The specimen is labeled with letters (A and D) and a ruler/scale is visible at the bottom.

arguments.attribute: gross anatomic structures and any rupture/aneurysmal change; relationship between vascular structure and adjacent bowel wall

dialogs.thought: Verify within the central specimen region whether there is aneurysmal/ruptured aorta adjacent to duodenum consistent with an aortoduodenal specimen.

content.content: The region shows a thick-walled, irregularly dilated vascular segment with disrupted/ruptured-appearing wall and adjacent bowel-like tissue; the labeled areas (A and D) lie close together, suggesting anatomic relationship between the aorta/aneurysm and duodenal wall.

dialogs.content: The main focus of the image is the gross pathology of a resected aortoduodenal specimen, which shows a ruptured abdominal aortic aneurysm and its relationship with the duodenal wall.
